body.title: announce/profile.py — load_profile (no inheritance, no lineage alias)
body.result: load_profile(agent_id, profiles_dir) at announce/profile.py; no inheritance, no lineage alias (E-decision). ProfileNotFoundError/ProfileValidationError. profile_yaml_etag(). Commits: agent_datacenter 7a99dfd, TheIgors 32eccac7.
body.description:
load_profile reads YAML at ~/.agent_datacenter/profiles/<agent_id>.yaml and returns a typed dict. Slice 1 = no inheritance (deferred to slice 5 per § 14 11.C), NO lineage alias path (E-decision: ship clean, no aliasing shims). Profile resolution per § 4.4.

Side effect on close: T-comms-lineage-alias-removal closes (profile.py shipped without alias path; design doc § 8.A updated to reflect E-decision).

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/profile.py (NEW), /home/akien/TheIgors/lab/design_docs/announce-protocol-design-2026-05-01-opus-pass.md (update § 8.A — alias not shipped)
**Design rules:** ship-clean-no-aliasing-shims (§14 E-decision); palace rule no-aliasing-shims-ship-clean
**Scope boundary:** in — load_profile(agent_id, profiles_dir=...) → dict; YAML schema validation; missing-profile raises ProfileNotFoundError; out — inheritance (slice 5), lineage alias (E-decision: NEVER ship)
**Test plan:** test_load_profile_reads_yaml, test_load_profile_missing_raises, test_load_profile_rejects_unknown_top_level_keys (defensive — catch typos), test_lineage_form_address_fails_clearly (regression for E-decision)
